ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal or outlet where the publication appeared */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Abstract or description of the publication */,
  "total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper, patent) */,
  "abstract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the abstract */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the author */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author associated with the publication */,
  "order_of_authorship" INTEGER /* Order of authorship in the publication */,
  "role_in_publication" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation record */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Publication ID that is being cited */,
  "cited_publication_id" INTEGER /* Publication ID that is citing another publication */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was recorded */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation was made */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., Google Scholar, Scopus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated publication */,
  "inventors" TEXT /* Inventors of the patent */,
  "patent_office" TEXT /* Patent office where the patent was filed */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Patent number assigned to the patent */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Application number for the patent */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution associated with the patent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent (e.g., filed, granted, expired) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the patent */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the patent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area of the journal */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the journal is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the conference is held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the conference */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area of the conference */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the conference proceedings are open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation record */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication presented */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference where it was presented */,
  "presentation_title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_presentations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_presentations_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book chapter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the chapter */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the chapter */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the chapter */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the chapter */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Chapter number in the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the academic institution (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_publications" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the user */,
  "role_in_publication" TEXT /* Role of the user in the publication (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funds awarded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the funding was awarded */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_funds_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user involved in the collaboration */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user involved in the collaboration */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication resulting from the collaboration */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
